assignments.description: MIS-7386 GM Owner Approval Process Update In Case

customErrorMessages.errorMessage: There was a problem closing the parent case. {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

customErrors.name: Error_Failed_To_Get_Approver_GM_Detailes

customErrors.name: Error_Failed_Updating_Billing_Processing_Instructions_on_Opp
customErrors.label: Error: Failed Updating Billing Processing Instructions on Opp

customErrorMessages.errorMessage: Error: Failed Updating Billing Processing Instructions on the related Opportunity
Failed to get GM for approval Contact salesops

customErrors.name: Error_Problem_updating_parent_case_to_in_progress
customErrors.label: Error: Problem updating parent case to in progress

customErrorMessages.errorMessage: There was a problem updating the parent case to in progress. Your case was not closed - Please contact MIS

decisions.name: Assign_Group_Field_Value_From_Account
decisions.label: Assign Group Field Value From Account

decisions.name: Case_Created_Add_Original_Requester_To_Case_Team
decisions.label: Case Created: Add Original Requester To Case Team

rightValue.stringValue: Company Documents (e.g. SOC 2, SOC 3, COI, Bank Letter)

decisions.name: Case_Created_Add_Requester_To_Case_Team
decisions.label: Case Created - Add Requester To Case Team

rules.name: Deal_Desk_Contract_signed_manually_created

rightValue.stringValue: Contract Signed Manually - Quote for Deal Desk Review

rules.label: Deal Desk : Contract signed manually created

rules.name: Billing_Email
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND ((2 AND 3 AND 4 AND NOT 5) OR ( 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 ))

rightValue.stringValue: Contract Signed Manually - Quote for Deal Desk Review

rules.label: Billing Email

decisions.description: MIS-7386 GM Owner Approval Process Update In Case
decisions.name: Case_Created_Extension
decisions.label: Case Created - Extension

decisions.name: Case_Record_Type_For_Closing_Email
decisions.label: Emails : Case Record Type For Closing Email

rules.name: Billing_Case_Closed_Email
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 5 and 8 and ( ((2 or ( 3 AND 4)) AND NOT 7) OR (6 and 7))
rules.label: Billing Case Closed Email

rules.name: Create_Child_Case_Automatically
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 AND 2) OR ( (3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6) AND 7) OR (8 AND 9)) and 10

rightValue.stringValue: Contract Signed Manually - Quote for Deal Desk Review

rules.label: Create Child Case Automatically

decisions.description: check if this is the first case for the related quote MIS-6714
decisions.name: First_Deal_Desk_Quote_Case
decisions.label: First Deal Desk Quote Case

decisions.description: MIS-7386 GM Owner Approval Process Update In Case

decisions.label: Found GM by role or email?

decisions.name: Found_more_cases
decisions.label: Found more cases
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No Other Quote Cases For Quote

decisions.description: MIS-7386 GM Owner Approval Process Update In Case
decisions.name: Requester_Role_Check
decisions.label: Requester Role Check

Flow.description: Excluded open case email send to salesops@similarweb.com MIS-7038 Change Owner of DDQ Cases MIS-7600 Replace Flow email alerts with classic email alerts and Templates MIS-7730 Remove close case dependency between parent and child case MIS-7648 Autorize DocuSign field logic adjustment :Authorized DocuSign block email : support@interioricons.com MIS-7600 - modify created + completed email templates MIS-7386 GM Owner Approval Process Update In Case Block emails hello@healthletic.io MIS-7433 - Replaced GM RR Approval process with Gal Har Zvi instead of Shay Harel MIS-7087 Optimize Auto-Complete Automation for Parent and Child Cases MIS-7004 Block email addresses from billing emails sent MIS-6865 - bypass Quote Validation disabled email sent to salesforce@smwb MIS-6785 - gm for approval process MIS-6861 - billing open and close emails Added error message Pending Escalation MIS-6819 Disable completed email alert MIS-6806 - Case Created: Emails To Requester -> billing email MIS-6801 Get GM Approver

formulas.description: Will block sending email to these addresses MIS-7004
formulas.name: Billing_Blocked_Mailing_Addresses
Billing_Group_Assigment_Formula
formulas.expression:
IF( OR( /* Group: Billing US */ $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "NA Enterprise", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "NA Inside Sales", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "Resellers Americas", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "NA Strategic", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "Investors", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "LATAM inside sales" ), "Billing US",
IF( OR( /* Group: Billing INT */ $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "EMEA Enterprise", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "EMEA Inside Sales", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "Resellers EMEA", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "EMEA Strategic", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "OEM", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "Agencies Strategic", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "Consultancies Strategic" ), "Billing INT",
IF( OR( /* Group: Billing APAC */ $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "APAC Strategic", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "APAC Japan", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "Japan Strategic", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "APAC China", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "APAC Inside Sales", $Record.Account.Forecasting_Division__c = "Resellers APAC" ), "Billing APAC",
/* Default Value if None Match */ null ) ) )

formulas.name: Billing_Group_From_ToAddress_Formula
formulas.expression:
IF( {!Related_Email_Message.ToAddress} = "billing@similarweb.com", "Billing",
IF( {!Related_Email_Message.ToAddress}= "billing-us@similarweb.com", "Billing US",
IF( {!Related_Email_Message.ToAddress} = "billing-int@similarweb.com", "Billing INT",
IF( {!Related_Email_Message.ToAddress} = "billing-apac@similarweb.com", "Billing APAC",
/* Default Value if None Match */ null ) ) ) )

formulas.description: conact values from all opp related cases
formulas.name: Billing_Processing_Instructions_Formula
EscalationEmailSubject
formulas.expression: 'Case Number ' + {!$Record.CaseNumber}+ ' status was changed to Pending Escalation'

formulas.name: Extension_Approval_Process_GM_Approver_By_Role
formulas.expression:
IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "APAC") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "Japan") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "Trellian") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "India") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "SEA") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "Maestros") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "Australia"), "GM - APAC",
IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "OEM") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "Agencies Strategic") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "Consultancies") , "GM - Vertical",
IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "LATAM") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "NA Enterprise") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "NA Strategic") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "NA SMB") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "Mexico") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "Brazil") || CONTAINS({!$Record.Requester__r.SysRoleName__c}, "Colombia"), "GM - America",
'none' ) ) )

formulas.name: Extension_Approval_Process_GM_By_Email

formulas.description: MIS-6987 Complete "Pending Requester" Status Exceeding x Days for salesops and deal desk CASE record type
formulas.name: Pending_Requester_Count_fr
formulas.expression:
IF( TEXT({!$Record.Status})='Pending Requester', IF( {!$Record.RecordType.Name}='Deal Desk', TODAY()+10, TODAY()+3), null
)

Flow.label: Case - RT - After Save

subflows.name: Case_AL_Auto_Create_Child_Case
subflows.label: Case - AL - Auto Create Child Case

subflows.description: MIS-6209 For using related objects in the assignment. otherwise email 2 case doesn't get the values
subflows.name: Case_AL_Email_To_Case_Assignment_Rules_Scheduled_Path
subflows.label: Case - AL - Email To Case Assignment Rules - Scheduled Path

textTemplates.name: Billing_Case_Closed_Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName},


Your Billing case {!$Record.CaseNumber} has been completed.


Account name: {!$Record.Account.Name}

Requester: {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Requester__r.LastName}

Case subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Case description: {!$Record.Description}



If you have any further questions, or need any additional assistance, simply reply to this email to reopen the case and we will assist accordingly.


Best Regards,


The Billing Team




--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: Billing_Case_Escalated_Body
textTemplates.text:
Dear Manager,


Please note that case {!$Record.CaseNumber} was escalated is currently under ‘Escalation’ status.

Please make sure to review the case.

textTemplates.name: Billing_New_Case_Email_Template_Body
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName},


Thank you for reaching out to Billing!


Your case was opened successfully; the case number is {!$Record.CaseNumber}


Account name: {!$Record.Account.Name}

Requester: {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Requester__r.LastName}

Case subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Case description: {!$Record.Description}


We’ll take a look at your case shortly and will get back to you soon.



If you have any further questions, please reply to this email or enter the case number in Salesforce and start chatting with us there!


Best Regards,


The Billing Team




--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: Billing_Reopen_Email_Body_Template
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Please note that case {!$Record.CaseNumber} was reopened.


Best Regards,

The Billing Team




--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: Deal_Desk_Reopen_Email_Body_Template
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Please note that case {!$Record.CaseNumber} was reopened.


Best Regards,

The Deal Desk Team




--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: DealDesk_Case_Closed_Body_Template
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName},


Your Deal Desk case {!$Record.CaseNumber} has been completed.


Account name: {!$Record.Account.Name}

Requester: {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Requester__r.LastName}

Case subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Case description: {!$Record.Description}


If you have any further questions, or need any additional assistance, please tag deal desk in the chatter of the case and we will reopen it and assist accordingly.



Best Regards,


The Deal Desk Team






--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: DealDesk_New_Case_Email_Template_Body
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName},


Thank you for reaching out to Deal Desk!


Your case was opened successfully; the case number is {!$Record.CaseNumber}


Account name: {!$Record.Account.Name}

Requester: {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Requester__r.LastName}

Case subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Case description: {!$Record.Description}


We’ll take a look at your case shortly and will get back to you soon.


If you have any further questions, please enter the case number in Salesforce and start chatting with us there!



Best Regards,


The Deal Desk Team




--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: EscalationEmailTemplate
textTemplates.text:
Case status was changed to Pending Escalation


Case : {!$Record.CaseNumber}

Owner: {!$Record.Owner:User.FirstName} {!$Record.Owner:User.LastName} {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name}

Subject: {!$Record.Subject}

textTemplates.name: Legal_Case_Closed_Body_Template
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName},


Your Legal case {!$Record.CaseNumber} has been completed.


Account name: {!$Record.Account.Name}

Requester: {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Requester__r.LastName}

Case subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Case description: {!$Record.Description}


If you have any further questions, or need any additional assistance, simply reply to this email to reopen the case and we will assist accordingly.



Best Regards,


The Legal Team






--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: Legal_New_Case_Email_Template_Body
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName},


Thank you for reaching out to Legal!


Your case was opened successfully; the case number is {!$Record.CaseNumber}


Account name: {!$Record.Account.Name}

Requester: {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Requester__r.LastName}

Case subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Case description: {!$Record.Description}


We’ll take a look at your case shortly and will get back to you soon.



If you have any further questions, please enter the case number in Salesforce and start chatting with us there!



Best Regards,


The Legal Team




--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: Legal_Reopen_Email_Body_Template
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Please note that case {!$Record.CaseNumber} was reopened.


Best Regards,

The Legal Team




--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: SalesOps_Case_Closed_Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName},


Your Salesops case {!$Record.CaseNumber} has been completed.


Account name: {!$Record.Account.Name}

Requester: {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Requester__r.LastName}

Case subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Case description: {!$Record.Description}


If you have any further questions, or need any additional assistance, simply reply to this email to reopen the case and we will assist accordingly.


Best Regards,


The Salesops Team





--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: Salesops_New_Case_Email_Template_Body
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName},


Thank you for reaching out to Salesops!


Your case was opened successfully; the case number is {!$Record.CaseNumber}


Account name: {!$Record.Account.Name}

Requester: {!$Record.Requester__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Requester__r.LastName}

Case subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Case description: {!$Record.Description}


We’ll take a look at your case shortly and will get back to you soon.


If you have any further questions, please reply to this email or enter the case number in Salesforce and start chatting with us there!


Best Regards,


The salesops Team



--Do not delete below this line--

textTemplates.name: SalesOps_Reopen_Email_Body_Template
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Please note that case {!$Record.CaseNumber} was reopened.


Best Regards,

The salesops Team
